description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a stone foundation. The exterior is clad in blue-gray horizontal siding, complemented by dark gray gable roofs and white-trimmed windows. The front features a wide wooden staircase leading up to the porch, which wraps partially around the house. There is a driveway on one side with two parked cars, leading to a side entrance and a set of double doors. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with shutters adding a traditional touch. The house has a spacious, open layout with visible interior rooms and a mix of stone, wood, and siding materials.
description: A blue-gray two-story suburban house with a wide front porch, stone foundation, and gable roofs. Features include white-trimmed windows, a driveway with cars, and a wooden staircase entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entry steps, stone foundation, and driveway with two cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, upper story windows, and the extension of the roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, roof intersections, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, side entrance, porch, and the arrangement of windows and roof sections.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden staircase leading to a covered porch with white columns and a prominent front door
